allow: Bash(.node/node-v20.18.1-win-x64/node.exe -e "const Database = require\('better-sqlite3'\); const db = new Database\('./server/data/sprint-society.db'\); const tables = db.prepare\(\\"SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table'\\"\).all\(\); console.log\(tables.map\(t => t.name\).join\(', '\)\); const users = db.prepare\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) as c FROM users'\).get\(\); console.log\('Users:', users.c\);")

Bash(../".node/node-v20.18.1-win-x64/node.exe" -e "const Database = require\('better-sqlite3'\); const db = new Database\('./data/sprint-society.db'\); const users = db.prepare\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) as c FROM users'\).get\(\); console.log\('Users:', users.c\); db.exec\('DELETE FROM runner_profiles'\); db.exec\('DELETE FROM user_xp'\); db.exec\('DELETE FROM chat_messages'\); db.exec\('DELETE FROM user_notifications'\); db.exec\('DELETE FROM strava_tokens'\); db.exec\('DELETE FROM users'\); console.log\('All accounts deleted.'\);")

Bash(../".node/node-v20.18.1-win-x64/node.exe" -e "const Database = require\('better-sqlite3'\); const db = new Database\('./data/sprint-society.db'\); db.pragma\('foreign_keys = OFF'\); const tables = db.prepare\(\\"SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' AND name != 'sqlite_sequence'\\"\).all\(\); tables.forEach\(t => { try { db.exec\('DELETE FROM ' + t.name\); } catch\(e\) {} }\); db.pragma\('foreign_keys = ON'\); console.log\('All data cleared from', tables.length, 'tables.'\);")

Bash(../".node/node-v20.18.1-win-x64/node.exe" -e "const Database = require\('better-sqlite3'\); const db = new Database\('./data/sprint-society.db'\); db.pragma\('foreign_keys = OFF'\); const tables = db.prepare\(\\"SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' AND name != 'sqlite_sequence'\\"\).all\(\); let cleared = 0; tables.forEach\(t => { try { const r = db.prepare\('DELETE FROM ' + t.name\).run\(\); cleared += r.changes; } catch\(e\) {} }\); db.pragma\('foreign_keys = ON'\); console.log\('Cleared ' + cleared + ' rows from ' + tables.length + ' tables. Database is empty.'\);")

Bash(../".node/node-v20.18.1-win-x64/node.exe" -e "const Database = require\('better-sqlite3'\); const db = new Database\('./data/sprint-society.db'\); db.pragma\('foreign_keys = OFF'\); const tables = db.prepare\(\\"SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' AND name != 'sqlite_sequence'\\"\).all\(\); tables.forEach\(t => { try { db.exec\('DELETE FROM ' + t.name\); } catch\(e\) {} }\); db.pragma\('foreign_keys = ON'\); console.log\('Database wiped clean.'\); db.prepare\('CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS invite_codes \(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, code TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL, max_uses INTEGER DEFAULT 50, used_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0, expires_at TEXT, created_at TEXT DEFAULT \(datetime\(\\"now\\"\)\)\)'\).run\(\); const existing = db.prepare\('SELECT code FROM invite_codes'\).all\(\); if \(existing.length === 0\) { db.prepare\('INSERT INTO invite_codes \(code, max_uses\) VALUES \(?, ?\)'\).run\('KENDU50', 50\); } console.log\('Invite code created: KENDU50 \(50 uses\)'\);")

Bash(../".node/node-v20.18.1-win-x64/node.exe" -e "const Database = require\('better-sqlite3'\); const db = new Database\('./data/sprint-society.db'\); const cols = db.prepare\('PRAGMA table_info\(invite_codes\)'\).all\(\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(cols.map\(c => c.name\)\)\);")

Bash(../".node/node-v20.18.1-win-x64/node.exe" -e "const Database = require\('better-sqlite3'\); const bcrypt = require\('bcryptjs'\); const db = new Database\('./data/sprint-society.db'\); const hash = bcrypt.hashSync\('kendusprint', 10\); const user = db.prepare\('SELECT id, email FROM users WHERE role = ?'\).get\('admin'\); if \(user\) { db.prepare\('UPDATE users SET password_hash = ?
